company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides AI-powered video editing automation, enabling content creators to produce high-quality videos faster with less manual effort.

plans.name: Pro Plan
plans.best_for: Professional creators, agencies, and YouTube/Instagram power users

policies.detail: No refunds are issued after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refund requests within 7 days are reviewed case-by-case.
24/7 support is available exclusively for Pro plan subscribers. Basic plan users receive email support during business hours (Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm EST).
All exported videos are stored in your account for up to 30 days. Pro plan users get unlimited cloud storage.
You can cancel your subscription at any time. Your plan remains active until the end of the billing period.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support for upload?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports direct uploads from YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitch, and local file uploads (MP4, MOV, AVI).

faqs.question: Can I try AutoStream for free?
faqs.answer: AutoStream does not currently offer a free tier, but you can start with the Basic plan at $29/month and upgrade anytime.

faqs.question: Is there an annual plan available?
faqs.answer: Yes! Annual subscribers save 20%. Basic Annual is $278/year and Pro Annual is $758/year.

faqs.question: What makes AI captions different?
faqs.answer: AutoStream's AI captions use speech-to-text with 97% accuracy, auto-sync with video timestamps, and support 30+ languages.
